Container.Name: YAHLP
Container.Overview:
YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal - Complete Master Template
Unified dashboard and reverse proxy for 19 homelab services: USENET (SABnzbd, NZBget, NZBHydra), TORRENTS (Transmission, qBittorrent, Deluge), SEARCH (Prowlarr, Jackett, Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Whisparr), UTILITY (Seerr, Bazarr, Tautulli, Maintainerr), MEDIA (Jellyfin, Plex, Emby).
Features: - Automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt (public mode) or HTTP (private mode) - 5 responsive layouts: Classic, Modern, Sleek, Minimal, Mobile - Flexible authentication: Basic Auth, Entra ID, Google OAuth, or none - Real-time service health monitoring - Customizable service ordering and theming
For simpler deployments, use specialized templates: - yahlp-private-none.xml (Private mode, HTTP, no Auth) - yahlp-public-basic.xml (Public mode, HTTPS, Basic Auth) - yahlp-public-google.xml (Public mode, HTTPS, Google OAuth) - yahlp-public-entra.xml (Public mode, HTTPS, Entra ID OAuth)
Documentation: https://github.com/auskento/YAHLP/docs
Container.Description: YAHLP - Comprehensive master template with all 19 services and complete configuration options. For simpler deployments, use yahlp-private-none, yahlp-public-basic, yahlp-public-google, or yahlp-public-entra templates.
Container.Requires: This app runs best on a dedicated IP on your LAN - not forwarding other ports to host. Your own domain name with DNS control for Lets Encrypt certificate generation Settings here are saved to yahlp.json5 on first run and are then overrides - if they exist, they take precedence over the config file

Config.Name: Internal IP (Private)
Config.Description: Server IP for private mode (e.g., 192.168.1.100)

Config.Name: Access Mode
Config.Description: public=subdomain-based routing with OAuth support (HTTPS via Let's Encrypt); private=folder-based routing with basic auth (HTTP on internal network)

Config.Name: Domain (Public)
Config.Description: Your domain for public mode (e.g., yahlp.yourdomain.com)

Config.Name: Email (Public)
Config.Description: Email for Let's Encrypt notifications (public mode only)

Config.Name: Let's Encrypt Test Mode
Config.Description: Let's Encrypt --dry-run mode (test without rate limits). WARNING: Certificates will NOT be issued. Set to false when ready for production.

Config.Name: Dashboard Name
Config.Description: Displayed in browser title and dashboard

Config.Name: Dashboard Layout
Config.Description: Choose: classic, modern, sleek, minimal (If you have added custom templates you can add them here)

Config.Name: Accent Color
Config.Description: Hex color for dashboard UI accents and highlights for default templates (e.g., #00A99D, #FF5733). Leave blank for default theme color

Config.Name: Dashboard Landing
Config.Description: Set the default landing page when accessing dashboard (e.g., sonarr, radarr, radarr/upcoming, seerr). Leave blank to show service grid

Config.Name: Service Display Order
Config.Description: SAB - SABnzbd, GET - NZBGet, HYD - NZBHydra, TRA - Transmission, QBI - qBittorrent, DEL - Deluge, PRO - Prowlarr, JAC - Jackett, SON - Sonarr, RAD - Radarr, LID - Lidarr, WHI - Whisparr, SEE - Seerr, BAZ - Bazarr, TAU - Tautulli, MNT - Maintainerr, JEL - Jellyfin, PLX - Plex, EMB - Emby

Config.Name: Sites Display Order
Config.Description: TPB - The Pirate Bay, FIL - FileList.io, HDB - HDBits, IPT - IP Torrents, 1337 - 1337x, YTS - YTS, LAT - LimeTorrents, NYA - Nyaa, PTP - PassThePopcorn, DOG - DOGnzb, DRS - DrunkenSlug, NLF - nzb.life, NFW - NZBFinder.ws, NGK - NZBgeek, PLA - nzbplanet.net, TAB - Tabula Rasa (Additional sites enabled in the sites.json5 file)

Config.Name: Window Behaviour
Config.Description: Jackett, Seerr, Emby and Plex do not play nice in frames, they'll either open in a new tab or popout window based on this setting

Config.Name: Authentication Type
Config.Description: Choose: none, basic, google, entra

Config.Name: Basic Auth Credentials
Config.Description: Format: user:pass or user1:pass1|user2:pass2

Config.Name: Entra Client ID
Config.Description: From Entra App

Config.Name: Entra Client Secret
Config.Description: From Entra App

Config.Name: Entra Tenant ID
Config.Description: Your Azure Tenant ID

Config.Name: Entra Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth callback URL - configure in Azure Portal. For public mode with OAuth, set to your domain's OAuth callback path

Config.Name: Entra Crypto Passphrase
Config.Description: Encryption passphrase for Entra

Config.Name: Entra Metadata URL
Config.Description: Entra OpenID metadata URL

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console - your URI should be set to your Dashboard Domain

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console

Config.Name: Enable SABnzbd
Config.Description: SABnzbd - Usenet Client (Config - Special - url_base() to /sabnzbd)

Config.Name: SABnzbd URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for SABnzbd service (usually http://sabnzbd:8080)

Config.Name: Enable NZBGet
Config.Description: NZBGet - Usenet Client (Set User and Pass below to bypass NZBGet auth

Config.Name: NZBGet URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for NZBGet service (usually http://nzbget:6789)

Config.Name: Enable NZBHydra
Config.Description: NZBHydra - Usenet Meta Indexer (Config - Main - URLBase to /nzbhydra)

Config.Name: NZBHydra URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for NZBHydra service (usually http://nzbhydra:5076)

Config.Name: Enable Transmission
Config.Description: Transmission - Torrent Client

Config.Name: Transmission URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Transmission service (usually http://transmission:9091)

Config.Name: Enable qBittorrent
Config.Description: qBittorrent - Torrent Client

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for qBittorrent service (check for port conflicts; default is http://qbittorrent:8080)

Config.Name: Enable Deluge
Config.Description: Deluge - Torrent Client

Config.Name: Deluge URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Deluge service (usually http://deluge:8112)

Config.Name: Enable Sonarr
Config.Description: Sonarr - TV Show Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to /sonarr)

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Sonarr service (usually http://sonarr:8989)

Config.Name: Sonarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page (e.g., sonarr, sonarr/calendar)

Config.Name: Enable Radarr
Config.Description: Radarr - Movie Automation ((Settings - General - URL Base to /radarr)

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Radarr service (usually http://radarr:7878)

Config.Name: Radarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page (e.g., radarr, radarr/calendar)

Config.Name: Enable Whisparr
Config.Description: Whisparr - Adult Content Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to /whisparr)

Config.Name: Whisparr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Whisparr service (usually http://whisparr:6969)

Config.Name: Whisparr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page for Whisparr (e.g., whisparr, whisparr/calendar). Leave blank for default

Config.Name: Enable Lidarr
Config.Description: Lidarr - Music Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to to /lidarr)

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Lidarr service (usually http://lidarr:8686)

Config.Name: Lidarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page for Lidarr (e.g., lidarr, lidarr/library). Leave blank for default

Config.Name: Enable Prowlarr
Config.Description: Prowlarr - Indexer Manager (Settings - General - URL Base to /prowlarr)

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Prowlarr service (usually http://prowlarr:9696)

Config.Name: Enable Jackett
Config.Description: Jackett - Indexer Aggregator (Config - Admin - url_base() to /jackett). For public mode with OAuth, configure JACKETT_OAUTH_URI in advanced settings

Config.Name: Jackett URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Jackett service (usually http://jackett:9117)

Config.Name: Enable Seerr
Config.Description: Seerr - Request Manager (In public mode, uses subdomain routing). For public mode with OAuth, also set SEERR_DOMAIN and SEERR_REDIRECT_URI

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Seerr service

Config.Name: Seerr Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Seerr (e.g., seerr.yourdomain.com). For public mode with OAuth, also set SEERR_REDIRECT_URI to https://[SEERR_DOMAIN]/oauth2callback

Config.Name: Enable Bazarr
Config.Description: Bazarr - Subtitle Manager (Settings - General - Base URL to /bazarr)

Config.Name: Bazarr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Bazarr service (usually http://bazarr:6767)

Config.Name: Enable Jellyfin
Config.Description: Jellyfin - Media Server (Settings -Admin Dash - Networking - Base URL /jellyfin)

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Jellyfin service (usually http://jellyfin:8096)

Config.Name: Enable Emby
Config.Description: Emby - Media Server (In public mode, uses subdomain routing). For public mode with OAuth, also set EMBY_DOMAIN and EMBY_REDIRECT_URI

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Emby service

Config.Name: Emby Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Emby (e.g., emby.yourdomain.com). For public mode with OAuth, also set EMBY_REDIRECT_URI to https://[EMBY_DOMAIN]/oauth2callback

Config.Name: Enable Plex
Config.Description: Plex - Media Server (in public mode, uses subdomain routing). For public mode with OAuth, also set PLEX_DOMAIN and PLEX_REDIRECT_URI

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Plex service (usually http://plex:32400)

Config.Name: Plex Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Plex (e.g., plex.yourdomain.com). For public mode with OAuth, also set PLEX_REDIRECT_URI to https://[PLEX_DOMAIN]/oauth2callback

Config.Name: Enable Tautulli
Config.Description: Tautulli - Plex Analytics (Settings - Show Advanced - Web Interface - Enable Proxy, Set Public Domain to https://yahlp.yourdomain.com/tautulli and HTTP root to /tautulli)

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Tautulli service (usually http://tautulli:8181/tautulli)

Config.Name: Enable Maintainerr
Config.Description: Maintainerr - Media Server Maintenance (Enable BASE_URL environment variable on its docker and set to /maintainerr)

Config.Name: Maintainerr URL
Config.Description: Local internal URL for Maintainerr service (usually http://maintainerr:6246)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users)

Config.Name: Configuration
Config.Description: Configuration folder - store the yahlp and sites JSON5 files here - ENV Variables override config settings, remove the variable settings from the form. Custom templates in the templates folder

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Read Timezone from host
